title: Surgeon Vacancy at Sahyadri Hospitals - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Sahyadri Hospitals - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Sahyadri Hospitals, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Coimbatore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Sahyadri Hospitals:
Sahyadri Hospitals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sahyadri Hospitals!
